title: POST /accounts/:id/mute, DELETE /accounts/:id/unmute, Relationship fields, and timeline filtering
description:
## What
Implement POST /api/v1/accounts/:id/mute (accepts notifications bool and duration seconds in body; creates or updates mute record; sets expires_at if duration provided) and DELETE /api/v1/accounts/:id/unmute (removes mute record). Both return Relationship object with `muting: bool` and `muting_notifications: bool` fields. Filter muted accounts from home timeline and notification queries.

## Why
Without mute/unmute actions and timeline filtering, users cannot silence accounts they find disruptive; the feature is non-functional without both the write endpoints and the read-side filtering.

## Agent team pattern
- Spawn a Research subagent to: curl mastodon.social POST /api/v1/accounts/:id/mute and observe Relationship response shape; check how muting_notifications appears; confirm that muting own account returns 422; document duration parameter behavior
- Spawn an Implementation subagent to: implement mute handler (validate not self-mute, upsert mute row with expires_at if duration given, return Relationship); implement unmute handler (delete row, return Relationship); add muted account filter to home timeline SQL query and notifications query
- Spawn a Test subagent to: write tests for (a) mute returns Relationship with muting=true, (b) unmute returns Relationship with muting=false, (c) muting own account returns 422, (d) muted account posts do not appear in home timeline, (e) expired mutes are auto-cleared on timeline query

## Test discipline
- Independent oracle: mastodon.social POST /api/v1/accounts/:id/mute returns Relationship object; muting own account returns 422; muted posts are absent from home timeline on next fetch
- Test approach: create two personas; mute one from the other; assert Relationship fields; post from muted account; assert home timeline of muter excludes the post

## Defensive programming checklist
- No `.unwrap()` in handler paths
- Muting your own account returns 422 -- check authenticated persona ID against target account ID before any write
- Expired mutes auto-cleared on timeline query -- check expires_at in WHERE clause or clean up in background; do not show expired mutes in GET /api/v1/mutes
- Parameterized queries only -- no string interpolation of account IDs into SQL
- Handle UNIQUE constraint violation on double-mute gracefully (upsert or ignore, not 500)
